_comment: Copy to distribution-config.json and replace every __PLACEHOLDER__. See README.md Step 5. CallerReference must be unique per create call.
Comment: ScrollWise web (S3 static UI only; API is served separately at api.scrollwise.net)

Aliases._comment: Custom domains. Use Quantity 0 and drop Items if using the default *.cloudfront.net URL.

Origins._comment: Single origin: just the static-site S3 bucket. The API is NOT proxied here — the browser calls https://api.scrollwise.net directly (CORS).

DefaultCacheBehavior._comment: Static SPA from S3. CachingOptimized managed policy id below.

CacheBehaviors._comment: No extra behaviors — there is no /api/* proxy. The API lives on its own domain.

CustomErrorResponses._comment: SPA routing: serve index.html (200) for client-side routes so React Router deep links work.

ViewerCertificate._comment: For a custom domain: set ACMCertificateArn (us-east-1 cert), SSLSupportMethod sni-only, MinimumProtocolVersion TLSv1.2_2021, and remove CloudFrontDefaultCertificate. For the default *.cloudfront.net URL, keep only CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true.
